events.label: assistant
events.text: I’ll inspect the meter image, read the four gas channels, then write the assessment JSON directly to `/app/answer.json`.

events.label: assistant
events.text: The display reads O2 20.9%, LEL 1%, H2S 2 ppm, and CO 170 ppm. CO is outside normal confined-space entry limits, so the permit entry cannot be authorized as shown.

events.label: assistant
events.text: I’m writing the JSON with a failed entry decision, using the CO value as the numeric reading because it is the out-of-limit channel driving the result.
